    <script>
        // Audience section - word reveal animation
        (function() {
            function wrapWords(el) {
                var words = el.textContent.trim().split(' ');
                el.innerHTML = words.map(function(w) {
                    return '<span class="word">' + w + '</span>';
                }).join('<span class="word-space"> </span>');
            }

            var title = document.getElementById('audience-section-title');
            if (!title) return;

            wrapWords(title);

            var titleObserver = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
                entries.forEach(function(entry) {
                    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                        entry.target.querySelectorAll('.word').forEach(function(w, i) {
                            setTimeout(function() { w.classList.add('revealed'); }, i * 80);
                        });
                        titleObserver.unobserve(entry.target);
                    }
                });
            }, { threshold: 0.3 });
            titleObserver.observe(title);

            var cards = document.querySelectorAll('.audience-card');
            var cardObserver = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
                entries.forEach(function(entry) {
                    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                        var idx = Array.from(cards).indexOf(entry.target);
                        entry.target.style.animationDelay = (idx * 90) + 'ms';
                        entry.target.classList.add('visible');
                        cardObserver.unobserve(entry.target);
                    }
                });
            }, { threshold: 0.15 });
            cards.forEach(function(c) { cardObserver.observe(c); });
        })();
    </script>

    <script>
        // ===== HERO BACKGROUND ANIMATION =====
        (function() {
            const canvas = document.getElementById('heroCanvas');
            const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
            let animationFrameId;
            let time = 0;
            
            // Mouse tracking
            const mouse = {
                x: null,
                y: null,
                radius: 200,
                active: false
            };

            const resizeCanvas = () => {
                const heroBackground = canvas.parentElement;
                canvas.width = heroBackground.offsetWidth;
                canvas.height = heroBackground.offsetHeight;
            };
            resizeCanvas();
            window.addEventListener('resize', resizeCanvas);
            
            // Track mouse movement on document level (works everywhere including over text/buttons)
            document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
                const x = e.clientX - rect.left;
                const y = e.clientY - rect.top;
                
                // Exclude navigation bar (64px height) from interaction
                const navHeight = 64;
                
                // Check if mouse is within canvas bounds and below nav bar
                if (x >= 0 && x <= canvas.width && y >= navHeight && y <= canvas.height) {
                    mouse.x = x;
                    mouse.y = y;
                    mouse.active = true;
                } else {
                    mouse.active = false;
                }
            });
            
            // Touch support for mobile (document-level, passive — never blocks taps/scrolling)
            document.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
                const touch = e.touches[0];
                const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
                const x = touch.clientX - rect.left;
                const y = touch.clientY - rect.top;
                const navHeight = 64;
                if (x >= 0 && x <= canvas.width && y >= navHeight && y <= canvas.height) {
                    mouse.x = x;
                    mouse.y = y;
                    mouse.active = true;
                } else {
                    mouse.active = false;
                }
            }, { passive: true });

            document.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
                const touch = e.touches[0];
                const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
                const x = touch.clientX - rect.left;
                const y = touch.clientY - rect.top;
                const navHeight = 64;
                if (x >= 0 && x <= canvas.width && y >= navHeight && y <= canvas.height) {
                    mouse.x = x;
                    mouse.y = y;
                    mouse.active = true;
                } else {
                    mouse.active = false;
                }
            }, { passive: true });

            document.addEventListener('touchend', () => {
                mouse.active = false;
            }, { passive: true });

            // Myop gradient colors
            const MYOP_COLORS = [
                { r: 221, g: 152, b: 255 }, // #DD98FF pink
                { r: 255, g: 134, b: 81 },  // #FF8651 orange/coral
                { r: 163, g: 151, b: 245 }, // #A397F5 purple
            ];

            // EXPLORATION - Floating Bubbles
            class FloatingBubble {
                constructor(initialIndex = 0, totalCount = 10) {
                    this.initialIndex = initialIndex;
                    this.totalCount = totalCount;
                    this.isInitialSpawn = true;
                    this.reset();
                    // Distribute evenly across canvas on initial load
                    this.y = (canvas.height / totalCount) * initialIndex + Math.random() * (canvas.height / totalCount);
                }

                reset() {
                    this.x = Math.random() * canvas.width;
                    this.y = canvas.height + 100;
                    this.size = Math.random() * 100 + 60; // Larger bubbles (60-160px)
                    this.speedY = Math.random() * 0.15 + 0.08;
                    this.speedX = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.1;
                    this.opacity = Math.random() * 0.12 + 0.06; // Slightly higher opacity
                    this.phase = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                    this.pulseSpeed = Math.random() * 0.008 + 0.004;
                    this.color = MYOP_COLORS[Math.floor(Math.random() * MYOP_COLORS.length)];

                    // On initial spawn, ensure mix of shapes; first bubble is circle, second is square, rest random
                    if (this.isInitialSpawn) {
                        if (this.initialIndex === 0) {
                            this.shape = 'circle';
                        } else if (this.initialIndex === 1) {
                            this.shape = 'square';
                        } else {
                            this.shape = Math.random() > 0.5 ? 'circle' : 'square';
                        }
                        this.isInitialSpawn = false;
                    } else {
                        this.shape = Math.random() > 0.5 ? 'circle' : 'square'; // Random shape on reset
                    }

                    this.rotation = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                    this.rotationSpeed = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.002;
                    this.vx = 0;
                    this.vy = 0;
                }

                update() {
                    // After 60 seconds (3600 frames at 60fps), start fading away
                    const fadeStartTime = 3600;

                    // Base movement
                    this.y -= this.speedY;
                    this.x += this.speedX + Math.sin(time * 0.0008 + this.phase) * 0.15;
                    this.rotation += this.rotationSpeed;

                    // Mouse interaction - gentle attraction
                    if (mouse.active) {
                        const dx = mouse.x - this.x;
                        const dy = mouse.y - this.y;
                        const distance = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);

                        if (distance < mouse.radius) {
                            const force = (mouse.radius - distance) / mouse.radius;
                            this.vx += (dx / distance) * force * 0.5;
                            this.vy += (dy / distance) * force * 0.5;
                        }
                    }

                    // Apply velocity and damping
                    this.x += this.vx;
                    this.y += this.vy;
                    this.vx *= 0.95;
                    this.vy *= 0.95;

                    // Don't reset bubbles after fade time - let them sail away
                    if (time < fadeStartTime && this.y + this.size < 0) {
                        this.reset();
                    }
                }

                draw() {
                    // After 60 seconds, start fading out
                    const fadeStartTime = 3600;
                    const fadeDuration = 1800; // Fade over 30 seconds (1800 frames)

                    const pulse = Math.sin(time * this.pulseSpeed + this.phase) * 0.08 + 1;
                    const currentSize = this.size * pulse;

                    // Calculate fade multiplier
                    let fadeMultiplier = 1;
                    if (time >= fadeStartTime) {
                        const fadeProgress = Math.min(1, (time - fadeStartTime) / fadeDuration);
                        fadeMultiplier = 1 - fadeProgress;
                    }

                    // Increase opacity when near mouse
                    let currentOpacity = this.opacity * fadeMultiplier;
                    if (mouse.active && fadeMultiplier > 0) {
                        const dx = mouse.x - this.x;
                        const dy = mouse.y - this.y;
                        const distance = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
                        if (distance < mouse.radius) {
                            const proximity = 1 - (distance / mouse.radius);
                            currentOpacity = this.opacity * fadeMultiplier * (1 + proximity * 1.5);
                        }
                    }

                    // Don't draw if completely faded
                    if (fadeMultiplier <= 0) return;

                    if (this.shape === 'circle') {
                        // Draw circle
                        const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(this.x, this.y, 0, this.x, this.y, currentSize);
                        gradient.addColorStop(0, `rgba(${this.color.r}, ${this.color.g}, ${this.color.b}, ${currentOpacity})`);
                        gradient.addColorStop(0.5, `rgba(${this.color.r}, ${this.color.g}, ${this.color.b}, ${currentOpacity * 0.5})`);
                        gradient.addColorStop(1, `rgba(${this.color.r}, ${this.color.g}, ${this.color.b}, 0)`);

                        ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
                        ctx.beginPath();
                        ctx.arc(this.x, this.y, currentSize, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                        ctx.fill();

                        // Subtle highlight
                        const highlight = ctx.createRadialGradient(
                            this.x - currentSize * 0.3,
                            this.y - currentSize * 0.3,
                            0,
                            this.x - currentSize * 0.3,
                            this.y - currentSize * 0.3,
                            currentSize * 0.5
                        );
                        highlight.addColorStop(0, `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${currentOpacity * 0.3})`);
                        highlight.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0)');

                        ctx.fillStyle = highlight;
                        ctx.beginPath();
                        ctx.arc(this.x, this.y, currentSize, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                        ctx.fill();
                    } else {
                        // Draw square
                        ctx.save();
                        ctx.translate(this.x, this.y);
                        ctx.rotate(this.rotation);

                        // Create gradient for square
                        const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(0, 0, 0, 0, 0, currentSize);
                        gradient.addColorStop(0, `rgba(${this.color.r}, ${this.color.g}, ${this.color.b}, ${currentOpacity})`);
                        gradient.addColorStop(0.5, `rgba(${this.color.r}, ${this.color.g}, ${this.color.b}, ${currentOpacity * 0.5})`);
                        gradient.addColorStop(1, `rgba(${this.color.r}, ${this.color.g}, ${this.color.b}, 0)`);

                        ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
                        ctx.fillRect(-currentSize, -currentSize, currentSize * 2, currentSize * 2);

                        ctx.restore();
                    }
                }
            }

            // STRUCTURE - Geometric Shapes
            class GeometricShape {
                constructor(initialIndex = 0, totalCount = 15) {
                    this.initialIndex = initialIndex;
                    this.isInitialSpawn = true;
                    this.reset();
                    // Distribute evenly across canvas on initial load
                    this.y = (canvas.height / totalCount) * initialIndex + Math.random() * (canvas.height / totalCount);
                }

                reset() {
                    this.x = Math.random() * canvas.width;
                    this.y = canvas.height + 100;
                    this.size = Math.random() * 70 + 45; // Larger shapes (45-115px)
                    this.speed = Math.random() * 0.18 + 0.08;
                    this.rotation = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                    this.rotationSpeed = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.004;
                    this.opacity = Math.random() * 0.3 + 0.2; // Higher opacity for better visibility
                    
                    // On initial spawn, distribute types evenly; after that, randomize
                    if (this.isInitialSpawn) {
                        const typeIndex = this.initialIndex % 3;
                        this.type = typeIndex === 0 ? 'circle' : (typeIndex === 1 ? 'square' : 'rect');
                        this.isInitialSpawn = false;
                    } else {
                        const rand = Math.random();
                        this.type = rand > 0.66 ? 'circle' : (rand > 0.33 ? 'square' : 'rect');
                    }
                    
                    this.vx = 0;
                    this.vy = 0;
                }

                update() {
                    this.y -= this.speed;
                    this.rotation += this.rotationSpeed;
                    
                    // Mouse interaction - gentle repulsion
                    if (mouse.active) {
                        const dx = this.x - mouse.x;
                        const dy = this.y - mouse.y;
                        const distance = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
                        
                        if (distance < mouse.radius) {
                            const force = (mouse.radius - distance) / mouse.radius;
                            this.vx += (dx / distance) * force * 0.8;
                            this.vy += (dy / distance) * force * 0.8;
                            this.rotationSpeed += force * 0.004;
                        }
                    }
                    
                    // Apply velocity and damping
                    this.x += this.vx;
                    this.y += this.vy;
                    this.vx *= 0.92;
                    this.vy *= 0.92;
                    
                    if (this.y + this.size < 0) this.reset();
                }

                draw() {
                    // Increase opacity when near mouse
                    let currentOpacity = this.opacity;
                    if (mouse.active) {
                        const dx = mouse.x - this.x;
                        const dy = mouse.y - this.y;
                        const distance = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
                        if (distance < mouse.radius) {
                            const proximity = 1 - (distance / mouse.radius);
                            currentOpacity = this.opacity * (1 + proximity * 1.2);
                        }
                    }
                    
                    ctx.save();
                    ctx.translate(this.x, this.y);
                    ctx.rotate(this.rotation);
                    ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${currentOpacity})`;
                    ctx.lineWidth = 2;
                    
                    if (this.type === 'circle') {
                        ctx.beginPath();
                        ctx.arc(0, 0, this.size / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                        ctx.stroke();
                    } else if (this.type === 'square') {
                        ctx.strokeRect(-this.size / 2, -this.size / 2, this.size, this.size);
                    } else {
                        const width = this.size * 1.5;
                        const height = this.size;
                        ctx.strokeRect(-width / 2, -height / 2, width, height);
                    }
                    
                    ctx.restore();
                }
            }

            // CONNECTION - Lines showing the journey
            class ConnectionLine {
                constructor(initialProgress = null) {
                    this.reset();
                    // Start some lines mid-progress for immediate visibility
                    if (initialProgress !== null) {
                        this.progress = initialProgress;
                    }
                }

                reset() {
                    this.startX = Math.random() * canvas.width * 0.3;
                    this.startY = Math.random() * canvas.height;
                    this.endX = this.startX + Math.random() * canvas.width * 0.4 + 200;
                    this.endY = Math.random() * canvas.height;
                    this.progress = 0;
                    this.speed = Math.random() * 0.0015 + 0.0006;
                    this.opacity = Math.random() * 0.12 + 0.06; // Higher opacity
                    this.lifetime = Math.random() * 5000 + 4000;
                    this.born = time;
                    this.color = MYOP_COLORS[Math.floor(Math.random() * MYOP_COLORS.length)];
                }

                update() {
                    this.progress += this.speed;
                    if (time - this.born > this.lifetime || this.progress > 1) this.reset();
                }

                draw() {
                    const currentX = this.startX + (this.endX - this.startX) * this.progress;
                    const currentY = this.startY + (this.endY - this.startY) * this.progress;
                    
                    let alpha = this.opacity;
                    if (this.progress < 0.15) alpha *= this.progress / 0.15;
                    else if (this.progress > 0.85) alpha *= (1 - this.progress) / 0.15;
                    
                    // Brighten when near mouse
                    if (mouse.active) {
                        const dx = mouse.x - currentX;
                        const dy = mouse.y - currentY;
                        const distance = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
                        if (distance < mouse.radius) {
                            const proximity = 1 - (distance / mouse.radius);
                            alpha *= (1 + proximity * 2.0);
                        }
                    }
                    
                    ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${this.color.r}, ${this.color.g}, ${this.color.b}, ${alpha})`;
                    ctx.lineWidth = 1;
                    ctx.beginPath();
                    
                    const midX = (this.startX + currentX) / 2;
                    const midY = (this.startY + currentY) / 2 + Math.sin(this.progress * Math.PI) * 25;
                    
                    ctx.moveTo(this.startX, this.startY);
                    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(midX, midY, currentX, currentY);
                    ctx.stroke();
                    
                    // Glowing dot at the end
                    const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(currentX, currentY, 0, currentX, currentY, 5);
                    gradient.addColorStop(0, `rgba(${this.color.r}, ${this.color.g}, ${this.color.b}, ${alpha * 0.7})`);
                    gradient.addColorStop(1, `rgba(${this.color.r}, ${this.color.g}, ${this.color.b}, 0)`);
                    ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
                    ctx.beginPath();
                    ctx.arc(currentX, currentY, 5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                    ctx.fill();
                }
            }


            // DEPTH - Small twinkling dots
            class TwinklingDot {
                constructor() {
                    this.reset();
                    this.y = Math.random() * canvas.height;
                }

                reset() {
                    this.x = Math.random() * canvas.width;
                    this.y = canvas.height + 50;
                    this.size = Math.random() * 2 + 0.8;
                    this.speed = Math.random() * 0.18 + 0.08;
                    this.opacity = Math.random() * 0.2 + 0.08;
                    this.twinkleSpeed = Math.random() * 0.015 + 0.008;
                    this.phase = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                    this.color = MYOP_COLORS[Math.floor(Math.random() * MYOP_COLORS.length)];
                }

                update() {
                    this.y -= this.speed;
                    if (this.y + this.size < 0) this.reset();
                }

                draw() {
                    const twinkle = Math.sin(time * this.twinkleSpeed + this.phase) * 0.5 + 0.5;
                    let currentOpacity = this.opacity * twinkle;
                    
                    // Brighten when near mouse
                    if (mouse.active) {
                        const dx = mouse.x - this.x;
                        const dy = mouse.y - this.y;
                        const distance = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
                        if (distance < mouse.radius * 1.3) {
                            const proximity = 1 - (distance / (mouse.radius * 1.3));
                            currentOpacity *= (1 + proximity * 2.5);
                        }
                    }
                    
                    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(${this.color.r}, ${this.color.g}, ${this.color.b}, ${currentOpacity})`;
                    ctx.beginPath();
                    ctx.arc(this.x, this.y, this.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                    ctx.fill();
                }
            }
            
            // Draw mouse glow effect
            function drawMouseGlow() {
                if (!mouse.active) return;
                
                const glowRadius = mouse.radius * 0.7; // Make glow smaller than interaction radius
                const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(mouse.x, mouse.y, 0, mouse.x, mouse.y, glowRadius);
                gradient.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(154, 112, 223, 0.12)');
                gradient.addColorStop(0.5, 'rgba(154, 112, 223, 0.06)');
                gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(154, 112, 223, 0)');
                
                ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(mouse.x, mouse.y, glowRadius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
            }

            // Create all elements for the journey with proper initial distribution
            const bubbles = Array.from({ length: 15 }, (_, i) => new FloatingBubble(i, 15));
            const shapes = Array.from({ length: 30 }, (_, i) => new GeometricShape(i, 30));
            const lines = Array.from({ length: 6 }, (_, i) => new ConnectionLine(i < 3 ? Math.random() * 0.5 : null)); // First 3 lines start mid-progress
            const dots = Array.from({ length: 35 }, () => new TwinklingDot());

            const animate = () => {
                time++;

                // Clear background with crisp white and subtle purple tint
                ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15)';
                ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

                // Draw mouse glow effect first (behind everything)
                drawMouseGlow();

                // Draw in layers: depth → connection → exploration
                dots.forEach(dot => { dot.update(); dot.draw(); });
                lines.forEach(line => { line.update(); line.draw(); });
                bubbles.forEach(bubble => { bubble.update(); bubble.draw(); });
                shapes.forEach(shape => { shape.update(); shape.draw(); });

                animationFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(animate);
            };

            animate();
        })();

        (function() {
            const nav = document.getElementById('mainNav');
            let lastScrollTop = 0;
            let scrollThreshold = 5;
            let isNavHidden = false;

            window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
                const scrollTop = window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;
                
                if (Math.abs(scrollTop - lastScrollTop) < scrollThreshold) return;

                if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
                    if (!isNavHidden) {
                        nav.classList.add('nav-hidden');
                        isNavHidden = true;
                    }
                } else if (scrollTop < lastScrollTop) {
                    if (isNavHidden) {
                        nav.classList.remove('nav-hidden');
                        isNavHidden = false;
                    }
                }

                if (scrollTop <= 0) {
                    nav.classList.remove('nav-hidden');
                    isNavHidden = false;
                }
                
                lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
            }, { passive: true });
        })();

        // Populate columns with duplicated content for infinite scroll
        function populateColumn(columnSelector, testimonialsList) {
            const columnInner = document.querySelector(`${columnSelector} .column-inner`);
            if (!columnInner) return;

            // Create cards HTML and duplicate for seamless infinite scroll
            const cardsHTML = testimonialsList.map(createTestimonialCard).join('');

        }

        // Responsive testimonials layout
        let currentColumnMode = null; // Track current mode to avoid unnecessary re-renders

        function getColumnMode() {
            const width = window.innerWidth;
            if (width >= 1100) return 3;
            if (width >= 768) return 2;
            return 1;
        }

        function distributeTestimonials() {
            const mode = getColumnMode();

            // Skip if mode hasn't changed
            if (mode === currentColumnMode) return;
            currentColumnMode = mode;

            // Clear all columns first
            document.querySelectorAll('.column-inner').forEach(col => {
                col.innerHTML = '';
            });

            if (mode === 1) {
                // Mobile: all testimonials in column-1
                populateColumn('.column-1', testimonials);
                const columnInner = document.querySelector('.column-1 .column-inner');
                if (columnInner) {
                    columnInner.style.setProperty('--duration', '54s');
                }
            } else if (mode === 2) {
                // Tablet: 2 columns (3 testimonials each)
                const firstColumn = [testimonials[0], testimonials[2], testimonials[4]];
                const secondColumn = [testimonials[1], testimonials[3], testimonials[5]];
                populateColumn('.column-1', firstColumn);
                populateColumn('.column-2', secondColumn);
                // Reset durations for 2-column layout
                document.querySelector('.column-1 .column-inner')?.style.setProperty('--duration', '27s');
                document.querySelector('.column-2 .column-inner')?.style.setProperty('--duration', '30s');
            } else {
                // Desktop: 3 columns (2 testimonials each)
                const firstColumn = [testimonials[0], testimonials[3]];
                const secondColumn = [testimonials[1], testimonials[4]];
                const thirdColumn = [testimonials[2], testimonials[5]];
                populateColumn('.column-1', firstColumn);
                populateColumn('.column-2', secondColumn);
                populateColumn('.column-3', thirdColumn);
                // Reset durations for 3-column layout
                document.querySelector('.column-1 .column-inner')?.style.setProperty('--duration', '18s');
                document.querySelector('.column-2 .column-inner')?.style.setProperty('--duration', '22s');
                document.querySelector('.column-3 .column-inner')?.style.setProperty('--duration', '20s');
            }
        }

        function initializeSeatDropdown(seatOptions) {
            const dropdownButton = document.getElementById('dropdownButton');
            const dropdownMenu = document.getElementById('dropdownMenu');
            const selectedValue = document.getElementById('selectedValue');

            dropdownMenu.innerHTML = '';

            // Set initial display to "Team size"
            selectedValue.textContent = 'Team size';

            seatOptions.values.forEach(item => {
                const seatValue = typeof item === 'object' ? item.value : item;
                const seatLabel = typeof item === 'object' ? item.label : `${item} Seat${item > 1 ? 's' : ''}`;

                const menuItem = document.createElement('div');
                menuItem.className = 'dropdown-item';
                if (seatValue === seatOptions.default) {
                    menuItem.classList.add('selected');
                }

                menuItem.textContent = seatLabel;

                menuItem.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    currentSeats = seatValue;
                    teamSizeSelected = true;
                    selectedValue.textContent = seatLabel;

                    document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-item').forEach(item => {
                        item.classList.remove('selected');
                    });
                    menuItem.classList.add('selected');

                    dropdownMenu.classList.remove('open');
                    dropdownButton.classList.remove('active');

                    updateAllPrices();
                    window.myop_cta_handler('seats_changed', { seats: currentSeats });
                });

                dropdownMenu.appendChild(menuItem);
            });

            dropdownButton.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                e.stopPropagation();
                dropdownMenu.classList.toggle('open');
                dropdownButton.classList.toggle('active');
            });

            document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                if (!document.getElementById('seatDropdown').contains(e.target)) {
                    dropdownMenu.classList.remove('open');
                    dropdownButton.classList.remove('active');
                }
            });
        }

            } else if (plan.id === 'unlimited') {
                // Flat rate pricing for unlimited plan
                const priceAmount = document.createElement('div');
                priceAmount.className = 'price-amount';
                priceAmount.innerHTML = `<span class="dollar-sign">$</span><span class="price-per-seat" data-plan="${plan.id}">${plan.price}</span><span class="price-period">/month</span>`;
                priceSection.appendChild(priceAmount);

                const priceTotal = document.createElement('div');
                priceTotal.className = 'price-total';
                priceTotal.innerHTML = `Flat rate`;
                priceSection.appendChild(priceTotal);

                const priceBilling = document.createElement('div');
                priceBilling.className = 'price-billing';
                priceBilling.textContent = 'Billed annually';
                priceSection.appendChild(priceBilling);
            } else {
                const priceAmount = document.createElement('div');
                priceAmount.className = 'price-amount';
                priceAmount.innerHTML = `<span class="dollar-sign">$</span><span class="price-per-seat" data-plan="${plan.id}">${plan.price}</span><span class="price-period">seat/month</span>`;
                priceSection.appendChild(priceAmount);

                const priceTotal = document.createElement('div');
                priceTotal.className = 'price-total';
                priceTotal.innerHTML = `Total <span class="dollar-sign">$</span><span class="price-total-amount" data-plan="${plan.id}">0</span>/month`;
                priceSection.appendChild(priceTotal);

                const priceBilling = document.createElement('div');
                priceBilling.className = 'price-billing';
                priceBilling.textContent = 'Billed annually';
                priceSection.appendChild(priceBilling);
            }
            cardContent.appendChild(priceSection);

            const ctaButton = document.createElement('a');
            ctaButton.href = 'javascript:void(0)';
            ctaButton.className = 'plan-cta ' + (plan.ctaStyle || 'secondary');
            ctaButton.textContent = plan.ctaText || 'Get started';

            const applyGradient = () => {
                ctaButton.style.background = 'linear-gradient(237deg, #FF7133 19.7%, #7C69FD 75.96%)';
                ctaButton.style.color = 'var(--white)';
                ctaButton.style.border = 'none';
            };

            const removeGradient = () => {
                ctaButton.style.background = '';
                ctaButton.style.color = '';
                ctaButton.style.border = '';
            };

            ctaButton.addEventListener('touchstart', applyGradient, { passive: true });
            ctaButton.addEventListener('touchend', () => {
                setTimeout(removeGradient, 150);
            }, { passive: true });

            ctaButton.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                e.preventDefault();
                applyGradient();
                setTimeout(() => {
                    handlePlanCTA(plan);
                }, 150);
            });
            cardContent.appendChild(ctaButton);

        // ===== Video Section Prompt + Preview =====
        (function() {
            function vsAutoResize() {
                var ta = document.getElementById('vs-prompt-input');
                if (!ta) return;
                // Reset height to let content determine size, then set to scrollHeight
                // but never below the CSS min-height (90px)
                ta.style.height = '';
                var sh = ta.scrollHeight;
                if (sh > 90) {
                    ta.style.height = sh + 'px';
                }
            }

            function vsPositionLink() {
                // No-op: link is now inside the relative background div,
                // positioned via CSS (bottom: -16px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%))
            }

            function vsEscape(t) { var d = document.createElement('div'); d.textContent = t; return d.innerHTML; }

            function vsGetText(el) {
                var c = el.cloneNode(true);
                c.querySelectorAll('.vs-color-preview, .vs-typing-cursor').forEach(function(e) { e.remove(); });
                c.querySelectorAll('br').forEach(function(b) { b.replaceWith('\n'); });
                return c.textContent || '';
            }

            function vsRenderColorsForTyping(el, text) {
                var cr = /(#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}\b|rgba?\s*\(\s*\d+\s*,\s*\d+\s*,\s*\d+\s*(?:,\s*[\d.]+\s*)?\))/gi;
                var hc = cr.test(text);
                if (!hc) return vsEscape(text);
                cr.lastIndex = 0;
                var html = '', li = 0, m, ci = 0;
                while ((m = cr.exec(text)) !== null) {
                    html += vsEscape(text.slice(li, m.index));
                    html += '<span class="vs-color-preview" data-ci="' + ci + '" style="background:' + m[1] + ';" contenteditable="false"></span><span class="vs-color-text" data-ci="' + ci + '">' + vsEscape(m[1]) + '</span>';
                    ci++;
                    li = cr.lastIndex;
                }
                html += vsEscape(text.slice(li));
                return html;
            }

            var pi = document.getElementById('vs-prompt-input');
            var sb = document.getElementById('vs-submit-btn');
            var cp = document.getElementById('vs-color-picker-input');

            // Typing animation
            var vsTypingText = 'Create a sign-up/sign-in form with a logo, title, subtitle, Google sign-in button, and email/password fields. Include proper error handling. The design should be clean, elegant, and inviting.';
            var vsTypingActive = true;
            var vsTypingTimer = null;
            var vsCharIndex = 0;
            var vsIsDeleting = false;
            var vsTypeSpeed = 35;
            var vsDeleteSpeed = 20;
            var vsPauseAfterType = 2000;
            var vsPauseAfterDelete = 800;

            function vsTypeStep() {
                if (!pi || !vsTypingActive) return;

                // Only type forward, run once — no deleting/looping
                vsCharIndex++;
                var currentText = vsTypingText.slice(0, vsCharIndex);
                pi.innerHTML = vsRenderColorsForTyping(pi, currentText) + '<span class="vs-typing-cursor"></span>';
                vsAutoResize();

                if (vsCharIndex >= vsTypingText.length) {
                    // Done typing — stop, remove cursor after a pause
                    vsTypingTimer = setTimeout(function() {
                        vsStopTyping();
                    }, vsPauseAfterType);
                } else {
                    vsTypingTimer = setTimeout(vsTypeStep, vsTypeSpeed);
                }
            }

            function vsStopTyping() {
                vsTypingActive = false;
                if (vsTypingTimer) clearTimeout(vsTypingTimer);
                // Remove cursor
                var cursor = pi ? pi.querySelector('.vs-typing-cursor') : null;
                if (cursor) cursor.remove();
                // Start video playback when typing animation ends
                var vsVid = document.getElementById('vs-video');
                if (vsVid) {
                    vsVid.currentTime = 0;
                    vsVid.play().catch(function() {});
                }
            }

            var vsIsMobilePrompt = window.innerWidth <= 905;
            var vsTypingStarted = false;
            if (pi) {
                if (vsIsMobilePrompt) {
                    // Mobile: skip typing animation, show full prompt immediately
                    vsTypingActive = false;
                    pi.innerHTML = vsRenderColorsForTyping(pi, vsTypingText);
                    vsAutoResize();
                } else {
                    // Desktop: Start typing animation only when 50% visible, run once
                    var vsTypingObserver = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
                        entries.forEach(function(entry) {
                            if (entry.isIntersecting && !vsTypingStarted) {
                                vsTypingStarted = true;
                                vsTypeStep();
                                vsTypingObserver.disconnect();
                            }
                        });
                    }, { threshold: 0.5 });
                    vsTypingObserver.observe(pi);
                }

                // Stop animation when user clicks to edit
                pi.addEventListener('focus', function() {
                    if (vsTypingActive) {
                        vsStopTyping();
                        // Keep current text for editing
                        var text = vsGetText(pi);
                        pi.textContent = text;
                        vsAutoResize();
                    }
                });

                pi.addEventListener('input', function() { vsAutoResize(); });
            }

            if (sb && pi) {
                sb.addEventListener('click', function() {
                    // Always use full prompt text, regardless of animation state
                    var p = vsTypingActive ? vsTypingText : vsGetText(pi).trim();
                    if (!p) p = vsTypingText; // Fallback to full text if empty
                    if (p) {
                        console.log('[submit] Prompt submitted:', p);
                        window.myop_cta_handler('prompt-submitted', { prompt: p });

                        // Store prompt in a cookie for 5 minutes, accessible from dashboard.myop.dev
                        var expires = new Date(Date.now() + 5 * 60 * 1000).toUTCString();
                        var encodedPrompt = encodeURIComponent(p);
                        // Determine cookie domain: use .myop.dev if on myop.dev, otherwise omit domain for local/other environments
                        var hostName = window.location.hostname;
                        var cookieDomain = '';
                        if (hostName === 'myop.dev' || hostName.endsWith('.myop.dev')) {
                            cookieDomain = '; domain=.myop.dev';
                        }
                        document.cookie = 'myop_playground_prompt=' + encodedPrompt + '; expires=' + expires + '; path=/' + cookieDomain + '; SameSite=Lax; Secure';

                        // Navigate to dashboard
                        window.location.href = 'https://dashboard.myop.dev';
                    }
                });
            }
            vsPositionLink();
            window.addEventListener('resize', function() { vsAutoResize(); vsPositionLink(); });

            // Video: plays when typing animation ends; play overlay always visible when paused
            var vsVideo = document.getElementById('vs-video');
            var vsPlayOverlay = document.getElementById('vsPlayOverlay');

            // Force first frame to display on mobile (mobile browsers don't auto-show it)
            if (vsVideo) {
                vsVideo.addEventListener('loadedmetadata', function() {
                    if (vsVideo.paused && vsVideo.currentTime === 0) {
                        vsVideo.currentTime = 0.001;
                    }
                    // Mobile: auto-play video immediately once metadata is loaded
                    if (vsIsMobilePrompt && vsVideo.paused) {
                        vsVideo.play().catch(function() {});
                        if (vsPlayOverlay) vsPlayOverlay.classList.add('hidden');
                    }
                });
            }
            if (vsVideo) {
                // Hide overlay when video starts playing
                vsVideo.addEventListener('play', function() {
                    if (vsPlayOverlay) vsPlayOverlay.classList.add('hidden');
                });

                // Show overlay when video pauses or ends
                vsVideo.addEventListener('pause', function() {
                    if (vsPlayOverlay) vsPlayOverlay.classList.remove('hidden');
                });

                vsVideo.addEventListener('ended', function() {
                    // When video ends, seek back to first frame and freeze (show login screen)
                    vsVideo.currentTime = 0.001;
                    if (vsPlayOverlay) vsPlayOverlay.classList.remove('hidden');
                });

                function vsPlayVideo() {
                    if (vsVideo.paused) {
                        if (vsVideo.ended || vsVideo.currentTime >= vsVideo.duration) {
                            vsVideo.currentTime = 0;
                        }
                        vsVideo.play().catch(function() {});
                    }
                }

                vsVideo.addEventListener('click', vsPlayVideo);
                if (vsPlayOverlay) vsPlayOverlay.addEventListener('click', vsPlayVideo);
            }
        })();
    </script>

    <!-- Demo Video Auto-play Script -->
    <script>
        (function() {
            const demoVideo = document.getElementById('demoVideo');
            const soundBtn = document.getElementById('demoSoundBtn');
            const expandBtn = document.getElementById('demoExpandBtn');
            const tapOverlay = document.getElementById('demoTapOverlay');
            const videoWrapper = demoVideo ? demoVideo.closest('.demo-video-wrapper') : null;
            const demoSection = document.querySelector('.demo-section');
            const iconSoundOff = soundBtn ? soundBtn.querySelector('.icon-sound-off') : null;
            const iconSoundOn = soundBtn ? soundBtn.querySelector('.icon-sound-on') : null;
            const tapLabel = tapOverlay ? tapOverlay.querySelector('.demo-tap-label') : null;

            if (!demoVideo || !demoSection) return;

            // Sound toggle
            function updateSoundIcon() {
                if (!iconSoundOff || !iconSoundOn) return;
                if (demoVideo.muted) {
                    iconSoundOff.style.display = '';
                    iconSoundOn.style.display = 'none';
                } else {
                    iconSoundOff.style.display = 'none';
                    iconSoundOn.style.display = '';
                }
            }

            if (soundBtn) {
                soundBtn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    demoVideo.muted = !demoVideo.muted;
                    updateSoundIcon();
                });
            }

            // Expand / fullscreen toggle
            // We move the wrapper to <body> to escape any parent transform/stacking context
            if (expandBtn && videoWrapper) {
                var originalParent = videoWrapper.parentNode;
                var originalNextSibling = videoWrapper.nextSibling;
                var backdrop = null;

                function enterFullscreen() {
                    // Create backdrop
                    backdrop = document.createElement('div');
                    backdrop.className = 'demo-fullscreen-backdrop';
                    document.body.appendChild(backdrop);
                    // Move wrapper to body so position:fixed works correctly
                    document.body.appendChild(videoWrapper);
                    videoWrapper.classList.add('fullscreen-mode');
                    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
                }

                function exitFullscreen() {
                    videoWrapper.classList.remove('fullscreen-mode');
                    // Move wrapper back to its original position
                    if (originalNextSibling) {
                        originalParent.insertBefore(videoWrapper, originalNextSibling);
                    } else {
                        originalParent.appendChild(videoWrapper);
                    }
                    // Remove backdrop
                    if (backdrop && backdrop.parentNode) {
                        backdrop.parentNode.removeChild(backdrop);
                        backdrop = null;
                    }
                    document.body.style.overflow = '';
                }

                expandBtn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    if (videoWrapper.classList.contains('fullscreen-mode')) {
                        exitFullscreen();
                    } else {
                        enterFullscreen();
                    }
                });

                document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
                    if (e.key === 'Escape' && videoWrapper.classList.contains('fullscreen-mode')) {
                        exitFullscreen();
                    }
                });
            }

            // Track if user manually paused
            var userPaused = false;

            // Tap to play/pause
            if (tapOverlay) {
                tapOverlay.addEventListener('click', function() {
                    if (demoVideo.paused) {
                        userPaused = false;
                        demoVideo.play().catch(function() {});
                        tapOverlay.classList.remove('paused');
                        if (tapLabel) tapLabel.textContent = 'Tap to pause';
                    } else {
                        userPaused = true;
                        demoVideo.pause();
                        tapOverlay.classList.add('paused');
                        if (tapLabel) tapLabel.textContent = 'Tap to play';
                    }
                });
            }

            // Update label on video events
            demoVideo.addEventListener('pause', function() {
                if (tapOverlay) tapOverlay.classList.add('paused');
                if (tapLabel) tapLabel.textContent = 'Tap to play';
            });

            demoVideo.addEventListener('play', function() {
                if (tapOverlay) tapOverlay.classList.remove('paused');
                if (tapLabel) tapLabel.textContent = 'Tap to pause';
            });

            // On end: stay paused, wait for user click to replay
            demoVideo.addEventListener('ended', function() {
                userPaused = true;
                if (tapOverlay) tapOverlay.classList.add('paused');
                if (tapLabel) tapLabel.textContent = 'Tap to replay';
            });

            // Auto-play when visible: observe the video wrapper on mobile (smaller element = easier to hit threshold)
            // and the full section on desktop
            var isMobile = window.matchMedia('(max-width: 768px)').matches;
            var visibilityThreshold = 0.2;
            var observeTarget = isMobile ? (videoWrapper || demoSection) : demoSection;

            function createAutoplayObserver(threshold, target) {
                return new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
                    entries.forEach(function(entry) {
                        if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                            if (!userPaused && demoVideo.paused && demoVideo.currentTime < demoVideo.duration) {
                                demoVideo.play().catch(function() {});
                            }
                        } else {
                            if (!demoVideo.paused) {
                                demoVideo.pause();
                            }
                        }
                    });
                }, {
                    threshold: threshold
                });
            }

            var observer = createAutoplayObserver(visibilityThreshold, observeTarget);
            observer.observe(observeTarget);

            // Re-create observer if viewport changes between mobile/desktop
            window.matchMedia('(max-width: 768px)').addEventListener('change', function(e) {
                observer.disconnect();
                var newThreshold = 0.5;
                var newTarget = e.matches ? (videoWrapper || demoSection) : demoSection;
                observer = createAutoplayObserver(newThreshold, newTarget);
                observer.observe(newTarget);
            });
        })();
    </script>
